goal: Founder fixes: no center deck-stack in shuffle anim; Celtic shuffle blank-board; gate signed-out coins behind the daily reading + sign-in CTA
done: (1) animateDealStack (main.js): cards pulled to centre INVISIBLE (opacity 0) instead of a visible stacked pile, then fade in as they spread — centre stack 'disappears' the moment the deal starts (spread kept). (2) Celtic shuffle left the 40-card board BLANK: it used animateSimpleCollect (opacity:0) + the re-deal sat behind performDeal's deferred rAF, so a dropped frame stranded every card at opacity 0. Fixes: render() uses the VISIBLE animateCollectSlots for ALL boards incl. full; performDeal calls the deal DIRECTLY (no rAF wrapper); animateDealStack cleanup is a plain setTimeout OUTSIDE rAF so cards ALWAYS end visible. Worst case now 'visible at centre', never blank. (3) Signed-out users get NO passive coins: +5 daily-LOGIN is signed-in-only (common.js, dynamic auth import, re-checks on resolve; chip still renders). They still earn +5 daily-reading on completion; reading.js shows a one-per-session 'Sign in to keep your Meow Coins' CTA via showSignInGate. Cache-bust 20260622k -> 20260622l; www synced.
fix: opacity-0 gather; visible collect + direct animate + guaranteed cleanup; login coin signed-in-only + signed-out reading sign-in CTA.
verified: headless daily.html deals cleanly, balance 0 signed-out
headless full.html shuffle worst-case DOM opacity 0.8 visible (not blank); real browser completes spread
